text.tspan: → Parsed.deinit() frees the whole parse tree

g.text: gzip: decompressed into a second ArrayList
→ APIResponse { body, headers owned by allocator }

text.tspan: allocator is passed on every grow

g.text: 2. Every fn that allocates takes std.mem.Allocator.
3. defer pairs with every allocation that owns memory.
4. Tests pass std.testing.allocator → use-after-free / leak detection.
